prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a smiling older Caucasian couple sitting at a rustic wooden table inside a cozy traditional pub. The man on the left has white hair and a full white beard, wearing a green fleece jacket over a maroon shirt. The woman on the right has short grey hair and glasses, wearing a blue denim jacket and cream scarf. They are looking directly at the camera, each holding one of the 2 glasses of beer. On the table in the foreground, there is 1 small lit brass lantern and 1 bowl of potato chips. The background features warm lighting, wooden paneled walls with framed pictures, windows on the left, and blurred patrons, creating a shallow depth of field.
